subtasks.description: A developer attempts to access the production database for live debugging purposes.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Developer 'dev-alice' lacks required Manager approval for production database access (POL-401) and debug operations are restricted to staging environment per POL-402. Live production debugging is not permitted.
applied_constraints: Production database access denied without Manager approval
Debug access must be performed in designated staging environment only
